message:
refactor: unify duplicate isSessionStale/isSessionProcessDead functions (gt-qgzj1h)

Replace isSessionStale method body with delegation to the existing
isSessionProcessDead free function. Both performed identical logic:
get pane PID, parse, FindProcess, Signal(0). Now there is a single
implementation to maintain, preventing drift.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
